steps.title: Identify the passage's core structure
steps.content: The passage moves from a general problem (building demolition waste) through Portland's specific response (a law requiring deconstruction) to concrete results (a 2019 study showing 27% of materials reused, the rest recycled). The purpose centers on this effort and its outcomes.

steps.title: Apply the structure to find the main purpose
steps.content:
Choice A matches: it captures both the effort (Portland's law requiring deconstruction) and the tangible results (27% reused, rest recycled).

Choice B, C, and D all introduce elements absent from the passage—public support trends, claims that deconstruction is ineffective, and comparisons to other cities—so none of them aligns with what the text actually conveys.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
